import React from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import Navbar from '../../components/common/Navbar'; import Sidebar from '../../components/common/Sidebar'; import LineChart from '../../components/charts/LineChart'; import BarChart from '../../components/charts/BarChart'; const StudentDetail = () => { const { id } = useParams(); const userName = localStorage.getItem('userName') || 'Instructor'; const student = { id, name: 'Asha Kumar', email: 'asha@example.com', totalAttempts: 45, accuracy: 45, avgTime: '8.2 min', driftScore: 0.89, status: 'High Risk', }; const accuracyTrend = { labels: ['Week 1', 'Week 2', 'Week 3', 'Week 4'], datasets: [{ label: 'Accuracy %', data: [75, 68, 55, 45], borderColor: 'rgb(239, 68, 68)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.5)', }], }; const topicPerformance = { labels: ['Arrays', 'Strings', 'Trees', 'DBMS', 'OS'], datasets: [{ label: 'Accuracy %', data: [45, 50, 38, 55, 48], backgroundColor: ['#ef4444', '#f59e0b', '#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#8b5cf6'], }], }; const alertHistory = [ { date: '2026-03-09', topic: 'Recursion', drift: 0.89, action: 'Review recommended' }, { date: '2026-03-07', topic: 'Arrays', drift: 0.82, action: 'Practice suggested' }, { date: '2026-03-05', topic: 'Trees', drift: 0.75, action: 'Instructor notified' }, ]; return (

Student Details

{student.name.charAt(0)}

{student.name}

{student.email}

{student.status}

Total Attempts

{student.totalAttempts}

Accuracy

{student.accuracy}%

Avg Time

{student.avgTime}

Drift Score

{student.driftScore}

Alert History

{alertHistory.map((alert, index) => ( ))}
Date Topic Drift Score Action
{alert.date} {alert.topic} {alert.drift} {alert.action}
); }; export default StudentDetail;
